name: The Sundher Group
message: Sundher Group is a family-owned Canadian lumber manufacturer based in Surrey, British Columbia, operating since 1996. They specialize in sourcing, producing, processing, packaging, and exporting custom cut lumber products globally, including Coastal Canadian Douglas Fir, Western Red Cedar, and Western Hemlock. Committed to sustainability and responsible forestry practices, they export their products to 30 countries and have received multiple awards for business excellence and trade. Their office in India focuses on importing and exporting Canadian wood products worldwide.
